error_description: Bad request — invalid or malformed request body
remediation: Check request parameters and JSON structure

error_description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key
remediation: Verify Admin API key (sk-ant-admin-*) is correct and active in Splunk credential store

error_description: Forbidden — insufficient permissions for this resource
remediation: Ensure you are using an Admin API key with the required organization permissions

error_description: Not found — the requested resource or endpoint does not exist
remediation: Verify endpoint URL and resource identifiers

error_description: Conflict — resource already exists or state conflict
Unprocessable entity — valid JSON but semantic errors
remediation: Review request body for logical errors
Reduce request frequency; check Anthropic rate limit tier

error_description: Internal server error — Anthropic server-side issue
remediation: Retry with exponential backoff; check Anthropic status page

error_description: The provided API key is invalid or not an Admin key
remediation: Re-enter correct Admin API key (sk-ant-admin-*) in TA configuration

error_description: The API key lacks permission for this operation
remediation: Ensure Admin API key has the required organization admin role

error_description: The requested resource does not exist
remediation: Verify organization ID and resource identifiers
